subcodes.first_line: O friends of God in all lands! We counsel you to manifest supreme steadfastness in this Most Great Announcement, whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله فی البلاد نوصیکم بالاستقامه الکبری فی هذا النبا الاعظم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
